/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/arithmetic.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libarithmetic.so -o libarithmetic.so CMakeFiles/arithmetic.dir/add.c.o CMakeFiles/arithmetic.dir/sub.c.o CMakeFiles/arithmetic.dir/mul.c.o CMakeFiles/arithmetic.dir/dur.c.o   -L/home/runner/work/calc/calc/prog  -L/home/runner/work/calc/calc/PUBLIC  -L/home/runner/work/calc/calc/.
